description: SSRF attacks force the server to make requests to unintended locations — often internal services, cloud metadata endpoints, or localhost.

rules.name: Cloud Metadata Endpoints
rules.description: Detects AWS/GCP/Azure instance metadata endpoint access

rules.name: Localhost / Loopback
rules.description: Detects attempts to access loopback addresses

rules.name: Internal IP Ranges
rules.description: Detects requests targeting private/internal IP address ranges

rules.name: Alternate Protocol Schemes
rules.description: Detects non-HTTP protocol schemes commonly used in SSRF

rules.name: DNS Rebinding Indicators
rules.description: Detects DNS rebinding helper services used to bypass SSRF filters
